title: Bad Apple
description: A mod that provides a Bad Apple-style renderer.
body:
![renderer_off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0be2f4090ba1062c97651e2b45e7e901c5e2927_0.webp)

![renderer_on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85460217ba2e64508af283e8e525f93903835c6b_0.webp)

When you enable the rendering option, your screen will be limited to grayscale. Adjust the contrast settings to better achieve the Bad Apple style.

With 1.5 contrast:

![1.5contrast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cee9ae0193128197003ccd30c30a474ff4a8487_0.webp)
